APPLICATION TO RECALL SANCTIONS; DECLARATION OF KEVIN C. MCDONOUGH FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELLIS, SHARON HEARING SET FOR NOV-20-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-20-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION TO RECAL SANCTIONS IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CCP SECTION 1005. FURTHERMORE, THE COURT IS WITHOUT JURISDICTION TO PROCEED DUE TO THE 11/20/2001 VOLUNTARY DISMISSAL, AND THEREFORE WILL NOT BE COLLECTIONG OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: GENA EALES, CSR	176. (212)
